faqs.question: How much does carpenter ant control cost in North Bergen?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ant control in North Bergen typically ranges from $350 to $2,000, depending on the size of your property, extent of the infestation, and number of colonies present. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any treatment.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have carpenter ants versus regular ants in my North Bergen home?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ants are significantly larger than common household ants (up to 1/2 inch long), are typically black or dark brown, and leave behind sawdust-like wood shavings called frass near baseboards or wooden structures. If you see large black ants, especially near wood or hear faint rustling sounds in walls, you likely have carpenter ants.

faqs.question: How long does carpenter ant treatment take in North Bergen?
faqs.answer: Initial treatment typically takes 1-2 hours depending on property size and infestation severity. Most infestations require follow-up visits over 2-4 weeks to ensure complete colony elimination, as carpenter ants nest both indoors and outdoors and may have satellite colonies.

faqs.question: Are carpenter ant treatments safe for my family and pets in North Bergen?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and application methods that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We recommend keeping children and pets away from treated areas until products dry (typically 2-4 hours), and we provide specific safety instructions during service.
